task: Create graph-native representation of the M-17 Engineering Bridge v2.1 pipeline output. Read the manifest at docs/pipeline-output/2026-03-06T01-06-52/_manifest.json for task metadata. For each of the 13 tasks, read the corresponding markdown file from the same directory for content. Create the following graph structure: (1) BLOOM node with id=bridge-v2.1, name=Engineering Bridge v2.1, type=specification, specVersion=v4.3, status=review, sourceRunId=2026-03-06T01-06-52, totalChars=208517, taskCount=13. (2) For each task output, create a SEED node with id=bridge-v2.1:TASKID (e.g. bridge-v2.1:t1), name=task title from manifest, seedType=document-section, content=full text from the markdown file, qualityScore from manifest, modelId from manifest, charCount from manifest, durationMs from manifest, taskId from manifest, order=task sequence number. (3) CONTAINS relationships from the Bloom to each Seed with an order property. (4) DEPENDS_ON relationships between Seeds matching the task dependency DAG from the manifest if dependencies exist. (5) An INSTANTIATES relationship from the bridge-v2.1 Bloom to the grammar-reference Bloom (id=grammar-reference, verify it exists first). Use existing graph query functions from src/graph/queries.ts — read the file first to find createSeed, createBloom, and relationship creation patterns. Use the same patterns, do not invent new ones. Store content as a content property on the Seed.
